videos.title: HTML & CSS Full Course for Free
videos.description: A comprehensive 6-hour course covering HTML and CSS from beginner to advanced concepts.

videos.title: CSS Crash Course For Absolute Beginners
videos.description: Brad Traversy's crash course covers CSS fundamentals including selectors, box model, flexbox, and more.

videos.title: CSS Specificity explained
videos.description: Kevin Powell explains how CSS specificity works with clear examples and visual demonstrations.

videos.title: Learn CSS in 20 Minutes
videos.description: A fast-paced introduction to CSS covering the most important concepts for beginners.

videos.title: CSS Box Model Tutorial
videos.description: Kyle explains the CSS box model including content, padding, border, and margin.

videos.title: The Secret to CSS Layouts
videos.description: Learn how display property values work — block, inline, inline-block, and when to use each.
